title: Cosmic Rocket Ship Coloring Page

funFacts: In space, astronauts grow up to 2 inches taller because the lack of gravity allows their spinal column to expand.
Rockets burn liquid or solid propellants to generate thrust, accelerating to escape velocity of 25,000 mph to reach orbit.
